---
title: "HagerZhang vs HagerZhangLS Comparison"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
engine: julia
---

## Setup

```{julia}
# output: false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate(; temp = true)
Pkg.develop(path = ".")
Pkg.add("CairoMakie")
using LineSearches, LinearAlgebra, CairoMakie
```

Helper to run both line searches on the same test case and plot side by side:

```{julia}
function plot_panel!(ax, φdφ, c0, αs, vals, φs, φ0, dφ0, α_hz, fα_hz, α_hzls, fα_hzls, δ, σ, ϵk)
    # Compute condition masks
    wolfe = map(eachindex(αs)) do i
        a, φc, dφc = αs[i], vals[i][1], vals[i][2]
        a > 0 && δ * dφ0 ≥ (φc - φ0) / a && dφc ≥ σ * dφ0
    end
    swolfe = map(eachindex(αs)) do i
        a, φc, dφc = αs[i], vals[i][1], vals[i][2]
        a > 0 && δ * dφ0 ≥ (φc - φ0) / a && abs(dφc) ≤ σ * abs(dφ0)
    end
    awolfe = map(eachindex(αs)) do i
        φc, dφc = vals[i][1], vals[i][2]
        (2δ - 1) * dφ0 ≥ dφc ≥ σ * dφ0 && φc ≤ φ0 + ϵk * abs(φ0)
    end

    # Shade Wolfe / Strong Wolfe / approx Wolfe regions
    ylo, yhi = extrema(φs)
    pad = (yhi - ylo) * 0.05
    ylo -= pad; yhi += pad
    ythird = (yhi - ylo) / 3

    for (mask, color, label, y0, y1) in [(wolfe, (:green, 0.2), "Wolfe", ylo + 2ythird, yhi),
                                          (swolfe, (:purple, 0.2), "Strong Wolfe", ylo + ythird, ylo + 2ythird),
                                          (awolfe, (:orange, 0.2), "Approx Wolfe", ylo, ylo + ythird)]
        i = 1
        first_span = true
        while i ≤ length(αs)
            if mask[i]
                j = i
                while j < length(αs) && mask[j+1]
                    j += 1
                end
                xs = [αs[i], αs[j], αs[j], αs[i]]
                ys = [y0, y0, y1, y1]
                poly!(ax, Point2f.(xs, ys); color = color, label = first_span ? label : nothing)
                first_span = false
                i = j + 1
            else
                i += 1
            end
        end
    end

    lines!(ax, αs, φs; color = :gray30, label = "φ(α)")

    # Armijo line
    armijo = [φ0 + δ * dφ0 * a for a in αs]
    lines!(ax, αs, armijo; color = :steelblue, linestyle = :dash, label = "Armijo")

    # Mark initial step length
    vlines!(ax, [c0]; color = :gray60, linestyle = :dot, label = "c₀ = $c0")

    # Mark both solutions
    if isfinite(α_hz) && α_hz > 0
        scatter!(ax, [α_hz], [fα_hz]; color = :blue, markersize = 18, marker = :circle,
                 label = "HZ α=$(round(α_hz; digits=6))")
    end
    if isfinite(α_hzls) && α_hzls > 0
        scatter!(ax, [α_hzls], [fα_hzls]; color = :red, markersize = 14, marker = :diamond,
                 label = "HZLS α=$(round(α_hzls; digits=6))")
    end

    axislegend(ax; position = :rt)
end

function compare_linesearches(φdφ, c0; αplot = nothing, title = "")
    ϕ(α) = φdφ(α)[1]
    dϕ(α) = φdφ(α)[2]
    ϕdϕ(α) = φdφ(α)

    φ0, dφ0 = φdφ(0.0)
    δ = 0.1
    ϵk = 1e-6

    # Default curvature (σ = 0.9)
    hz_default = HagerZhang()
    hz_default.mayterminate[] = false
    hzls_default = HagerZhangLS()
    α_hz_09, fα_hz_09 = hz_default(ϕ, dϕ, ϕdϕ, c0, φ0, dφ0)
    α_hzls_09, fα_hzls_09 = hzls_default(ϕ, dϕ, ϕdϕ, c0, φ0, dφ0)
    curv_low = 0.5
    # Stricter curvature (σ = curv_low)
    hz_strict = HagerZhang(sigma = curv_low)
    hz_strict.mayterminate[] = false
    hzls_strict = HagerZhangLS(curvature = curv_low)
    α_hz_07, fα_hz_07 = hz_strict(ϕ, dϕ, ϕdϕ, c0, φ0, dφ0)
    α_hzls_07, fα_hzls_07 = hzls_strict(ϕ, dϕ, ϕdϕ, c0, φ0, dφ0)

    # Plot range: ensure it extends beyond all solutions
    candidates = filter(isfinite, [α_hz_09, α_hzls_09, α_hz_07, α_hzls_07, c0])
    αmin_needed = isempty(candidates) ? 2c0 : 1.5 * maximum(candidates)
    αmax = isnothing(αplot) ? αmin_needed : max(αplot, αmin_needed)
    αs = range(0, αmax, length = 1000)
    vals = [φdφ(a) for a in αs]
    φs = [v[1] for v in vals]

    fig = Figure(size = (1200, 400))
    ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1]; xlabel = "α", ylabel = "φ(α)", title = "$title (σ = 0.9)")
    ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2]; xlabel = "α", ylabel = "φ(α)", title = "$title (σ = $(curv_low))")

    plot_panel!(ax1, φdφ, c0, αs, vals, φs, φ0, dφ0, α_hz_09, fα_hz_09, α_hzls_09, fα_hzls_09, δ, 0.9, ϵk)
    plot_panel!(ax2, φdφ, c0, αs, vals, φs, φ0, dφ0, α_hz_07, fα_hz_07, α_hzls_07, fα_hzls_07, δ, 0.7, ϵk)

    fig
end
```

## Test 1: Oscillatory

$$\phi(\alpha) = e^{-\alpha} \cos(5\alpha)$$

Multiple local minima, exponentially decaying envelope.

```{julia}
function φdφ_osc(α)
    e = exp(-α)
    (e * cos(5α), -e * (cos(5α) + 5sin(5α)))
end
compare_linesearches(φdφ_osc, 0.5; αplot = 8.0, title = "Oscillatory: e^{-α}cos(5α)")
```

## Test 2: Quadratic

$$\phi(\alpha) = (\alpha - 2)^2$$

Minimum at α = 2.

```{julia}
φdφ_quad(α) = ((α - 2)^2, 2(α - 2))
compare_linesearches(φdφ_quad, 1.0; title = "Quadratic: (α-2)²")
```

## Test 3: Cubic

$$\phi(\alpha) = -2\alpha^3 + 9\alpha^2 - 12\alpha + 5$$

Local min at α = 1, local max at α = 3.

```{julia}
φdφ_cubic(α) = (-2α^3 + 9α^2 - 12α + 5, -6α^2 + 18α - 12)
compare_linesearches(φdφ_cubic, 1.0; αplot = 4.0, title = "Cubic: -2α³+9α²-12α+5")
```

## Test 4: Rosenbrock from (0,0)

$f(x) = (1-x_1)^2 + 100(x_2 - x_1^2)^2$ at $x = (0,0)$, $d = (2, 0)$.

```{julia}
function rosenbrock_line(α)
    x = [0.0, 0.0] .+ α .* [2.0, 0.0]
    f = (1 - x[1])^2 + 100(x[2] - x[1]^2)^2
    g = [-2(1 - x[1]) - 400x[1]*(x[2] - x[1]^2), 200(x[2] - x[1]^2)]
    d = [2.0, 0.0]
    (f, dot(g, d))
end
compare_linesearches(rosenbrock_line, 1.0; αplot = 1.5, title = "Rosenbrock from (0,0), d=(2,0)")
```

## Test 5: Rosenbrock from (-1,1)

At $x = (-1, 1)$: $d = -g = (4, 0)$.

```{julia}
function rosenbrock_line2(α)
    x = [-1.0, 1.0] .+ α .* [4.0, 0.0]
    f = (1 - x[1])^2 + 100(x[2] - x[1]^2)^2
    g = [-2(1 - x[1]) - 400x[1]*(x[2] - x[1]^2), 200(x[2] - x[1]^2)]
    d = [4.0, 0.0]
    (f, dot(g, d))
end
compare_linesearches(rosenbrock_line2, 1.0; αplot = 1.5, title = "Rosenbrock from (-1,1), d=(4,0)")
```

## Test 6: Steep valley

$$\phi(\alpha) = \alpha^2 + 10000(\alpha - 0.5)^2$$

Minimum near α ≈ 0.49995.

```{julia}
φdφ_steep(α) = (α^2 + 10000(α - 0.5)^2, 2α + 20000(α - 0.5))
compare_linesearches(φdφ_steep, 1.0; αplot = 1.0, title = "Steep valley: α²+10000(α-0.5)²")
```

## Test 7: Sigmoid

$$\phi(\alpha) = \frac{1}{1 + e^{-20(\alpha - 3)}} - \alpha/10$$

Nearly flat for small α, then a sharp transition.

```{julia}
function φdφ_sigmoid(α)
    s = 1 / (1 + exp(-20(α - 3)))
    ds = 20 * s * (1 - s)
    (s - α/10, ds - 0.1)
end
compare_linesearches(φdφ_sigmoid, 1.0; αplot = 6.0, title = "Sigmoid: 1/(1+e^{-20(α-3)}) - α/10")
```

## Test 8: Hyperbolic + quadratic

$$\phi(\alpha) = \frac{1}{\alpha + 1} + 0.01(\alpha - 10)^2 - 1$$

```{julia}
φdφ_flat(α) = (1/(α+1) + 0.01(α - 10)^2 - 1, -1/(α+1)^2 + 0.02(α - 10))
compare_linesearches(φdφ_flat, 1.0; αplot = 15.0, title = "Hyperbolic + quadratic")
```

## Test 9: Quadratic with tiny c₀

Same quadratic as Test 2 but with $c_0 = 10^{-6}$.

```{julia}
compare_linesearches(φdφ_quad, 1e-6; title = "Quadratic with c₀ = 1e-6")
```

## Test 10: Quadratic with large c₀

Same quadratic but with $c_0 = 100$.

```{julia}
compare_linesearches(φdφ_quad, 100.0; αplot = 5.0, title = "Quadratic with c₀ = 100")
```

## Test 11: Log barrier

$$\phi(\alpha) = -\log(1 + \alpha) + 0.1\alpha^2$$

Minimum near α ≈ 1.79.

```{julia}
φdφ_logbarrier(α) = (-log(1 + α) + 0.1α^2, -1/(1 + α) + 0.2α)
compare_linesearches(φdφ_logbarrier, 1.0; αplot = 5.0, title = "Log barrier: -log(1+α) + 0.1α²")
```

## Test 12: Narrow well

$$\phi(\alpha) = -\alpha + 0.3\alpha^2 - e^{-100(\alpha - 2)^2}$$

Very localized minimum at α = 2.

```{julia}
function φdφ_narrowwell(α)
    g = exp(-100(α - 2)^2)
    (-α + 0.3α^2 - g, -1 + 0.6α + 200(α - 2) * g)
end
compare_linesearches(φdφ_narrowwell, 1.0; αplot = 4.0, title = "Narrow well: -α + 0.3α² - exp(-100(α-2)²)")
```

## Test 13: Double well

$$\phi(\alpha) = (\alpha^2 - 4)^2 - 5\alpha$$

Two minima with a linear tilt breaking symmetry.

```{julia}
φdφ_doublewell(α) = ((α^2 - 4)^2 - 5α, 4α*(α^2 - 4) - 5)
compare_linesearches(φdφ_doublewell, 1.0; αplot = 4.0, title = "Double well: (α²-4)² - 5α")
```

## Test 14: Noisy quadratic

$$\phi(\alpha) = (\alpha - 3)^2 + 0.1\sin(50\alpha)$$

Quadratic trend with many local bumps.

```{julia}
φdφ_noisy(α) = ((α - 3)^2 + 0.1sin(50α), 2(α - 3) + 5cos(50α))
compare_linesearches(φdφ_noisy, 1.0; αplot = 6.0, title = "Noisy quadratic: (α-3)² + 0.1sin(50α)")
```

## Test 15: Exp + quadratic

$$\phi(\alpha) = e^{-3\alpha} + \alpha^2$$

Steep exponential decay near origin, quadratic growth for large α.

```{julia}
function φdφ_expquad(α)
    e = exp(-3α)
    (e + α^2, -3e + 2α)
end
compare_linesearches(φdφ_expquad, 1.0; αplot = 2.0, title = "Exp+quadratic: e^{-3α} + α²")
```

## Test 16: Plateau

$$\phi(\alpha) = -\tanh(10(\alpha - 1)) + 0.5(\alpha - 3)^2$$

Flat descent through a tanh step, then quadratic rise.

```{julia}
function φdφ_plateau(α)
    t = tanh(10(α - 1))
    dt = 10(1 - t^2)
    (-t + 0.5(α - 3)^2, -dt + (α - 3))
end
compare_linesearches(φdφ_plateau, 1.0; αplot = 5.0, title = "Plateau: -tanh(10(α-1)) + 0.5(α-3)²")
```
